examples.title: Pseudocode: Deadlock Detection
examples.description: Detecting deadlock using a Resource-Allocation Graph (RAG)
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DetectDeadlock
INPUT: RAG (Resource-Allocation Graph)
OUTPUT: Boolean indicating deadlock presence

BEGIN
 FOR EACH process P in RAG
 IF P is waiting for a resource AND
 a cycle exists in RAG involving P
 THEN RETURN TRUE (deadlock detected)
 RETURN FALSE (no deadlock detected)
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how to detect deadlocks by analyzing a Resource-Allocation Graph (RAG) for cycles involving waiting processes.

examples.title: Python: Deadlock Detection

examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates how to create a Resource-Allocation Graph (RAG) and detect deadlocks by analyzing cycles involving waiting processes.
